## Purpose

## Change Type

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Build/CI
- [ ] Code skeleton
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Other

## Risk Checklist

- [ ] Does not implement injection, memory access, packet modification, or anti-cheat bypass.
- [ ] Does not collect credentials, tokens, cookies, or payment data.
- [ ] Does not upload screenshots/logs/personal data without explicit consent.
- [ ] Does not copy unlicensed code, assets, templates, or documents.
- [ ] Lists every third-party source consulted or confirms this is an independent clean-room change.
- [ ] Any screen capture or input is restricted to the declared scope and passes target-window, focus, size/DPI, confidence, UnknownState, cancellation, post-condition, and emergency-stop checks.
- [ ] Does not add real game business, unattended execution, macro recording, arbitrary scripts, remote control, or automatic high-value-resource spending unless separately approved.
- [ ] New dependencies and third-party code/assets/models/fonts/binaries are listed with licenses, or the PR explicitly states that none were added.
- [ ] Diagnostics remain local-only and contain no credentials, tokens, cookies, passwords, or silent uploads.
- [ ] Tests or verification steps are listed below.

## Verification
